title: common-accounting
description: Accounting-system stub used by Cash Conductor (W7-8 v1.0). Xero-only in v1.0 per master brief §8.2 row 4; extensible later. Per PRODUCT-SPEC §5.3 line 362.

accounting_choice.description: None = Cash Conductor not deployed for this tenant. Xero = deployed.

xero_tenant_id.description: Xero tenant ID; one per IFOS-tenant. Loaded from _secrets.env.

chase_cadence.description: Default Cash Conductor cadence; tenant-overridable per autosend-safety-policy §6 tenant-override discipline.

escalation_threshold_gbp.description: Outstanding amount above which Cash Conductor escalates to operator via ESC route rather than auto-chasing.

open_banking_provider.description: v1.0 closes loop via Open Banking reconciliation per Ultraplan §8.1 A4; truelayer placeholder.
